summary: Full-stack testing of THE BARBER CRAFT app. All 19 backend API tests passed. All critical UI flows work: landing page, auth modal (login/register tabs), admin login → /admin redirect, customer login → /dashboard redirect, 4-step booking flow, mock payment confirmation screen, admin dashboard stats/bookings/customers, process expired wallets button.

issues: Missing aria-describedby on DialogContent (console warning, not functional issue)

critical_code_review_comments: Admin seed does NOT update password if already exists (line 481-483 only updates hash if check_pw fails, which is correct idempotent behavior)
CORS is set to allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False — fine for this app but credentials (cookies) won't work across origins if needed later
server.py is 488 lines — approaching limit but acceptable for current scope
No brute-force lockout implemented (mentioned in playbook testing instructions)
No httpOnly cookies used — JWT stored in localStorage per design spec, acceptable given app requirements
seed_data_creation: Created test customer: test_customer_api@barbercraft.com. Created multiple test bookings via API tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core flows verified working. Backend 19/19 tests pass. UI flows: landing page, auth modal login/register, admin login→/admin, customer login→/dashboard, 4-step booking (service→slot type→date+time→review&pay), mock payment confirmation, admin stats+bookings+customers+process expired wallets. Test customer: test_customer_api@barbercraft.com / Test123! exists in DB with some bookings. One minor: no brute-force lockout implemented.
